Off Calendar Sep-29-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST'S Motion For Attorneys Fees To Be Included In Judgment is GRANTED. Plaintiff is entitled to recover $8,320.35 in fees. Written order and judgment are signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)
